title: Agent System Benchmark Comparison
brief: A humorous but professional benchmark comparison chart styled like a GPU/CPU benchmark. Four horizontal bars representing different 'singer agents': 1) '普通KTV用户 (Normal User)' - short green bar reaching E4, 2) '职业歌手 (Pro Singer)' - medium blue bar reaching G5, 3) '萨顶顶 in 左手指月 (Sadingding)' - very long gold bar reaching B5 with flame effects, 4) '花腔女高音上限 (Soprano Limit)' - thin red line at C6. Above each bar are technical specs: 'Latency', 'Throughput (Octaves)', 'Stability Score'. Sadingding's bar has annotations: 'Zero Packet Loss', 'Zero Downtime', 'Multi-Modal Routing'. Dark background with glowing bars. Looks like a tech review website benchmark page. Chinese and English labels. Flat tech infographic style.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Agent System Benchmark Comparison'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A humorous but professional benchmark comparison chart styled like a GPU/CPU benchmark. Four horizontal bars representing different 'singer agents': 1) '普通KTV用户 (Normal User)' - short green bar reaching E4, 2) '职业歌手 (Pro Singer)' - medium blue bar reaching G5, 3) '萨顶顶 in 左手指月 (Sadingding)' - very long gold bar reaching B5 with flame effects, 4) '花腔女高音上限 (Soprano Limit)' - thin red line at C6. Above each bar are technical specs: 'Latency', 'Throughput (Octaves)', 'Stability Score'. Sadingding's bar has annotations: 'Zero Packet Loss', 'Zero Downtime', 'Multi-Modal Routing'. Dark background with glowing bars. Looks like a tech review website benchmark page. Chinese and English labels. Flat tech infographic style.
